base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of super_star_spin — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1985 super mario bros. face rotates from full-front. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame star spin — face rotates from full-front → 3-quarter → edge → 3-quarter-back; palette cycles same as Fire Flower; bounces on ground travel
